Points Reference
+4Win the match
+3Lose by 1-2 pts (11-10, 11-9)
+2Lose by 3-4 pts (11-8, 11-7)
+1Lose by 5-8 pts (11-6 to 11-3)
+0Lose by 9+ pts (11-2 or worse)
-1Default / No-show
